description: Systematic audit of feature parity across hex's three user surfaces: CLI, MCP tools, and dashboard. Identify gaps, document coverage matrix, and create remediation plan. ADR-2603222229.

phases.name: Audit CLI → MCP parity
phases.description: For every hex CLI subcommand, check if a corresponding MCP tool exists in config/mcp-tools.json. Produce a coverage matrix.

tasks.name: Extract all CLI commands
tasks.description: Run hex --help, hex <cmd> --help for every subcommand. Produce a flat list of all executable commands with their descriptions. Include subcommand variants (e.g. hex adr list, hex adr search).

tasks.name: Map CLI commands to MCP tools
tasks.description: For each CLI command from P1.1, check if config/mcp-tools.json has a matching tool. Mark as: present, missing, or partial (tool exists but with different params). Include the MCP tool name for matches.

phases.name: Audit MCP → CLI parity
phases.description: For every MCP tool, check if a corresponding CLI command exists. Identify MCP-only tools.

tasks.name: Map MCP tools to CLI commands
tasks.description: Parse config/mcp-tools.json tools array. For each tool, check if hex-cli has a matching subcommand. Mark MCP-only tools (e.g. hex_session_start, hex_session_heartbeat, hex_workplan_activate). These are intentionally MCP-only for open model support.

phases.name: Audit dashboard views → CLI/MCP coverage
phases.description: For every dashboard view/pane, check what CLI commands and MCP tools provide equivalent data.

tasks.name: Inventory dashboard views and data sources
tasks.description: List all dashboard views from hex-nexus/assets/src/components/views/ and hex-nexus/assets/src/components/project/. For each view, document: what data it shows, which REST endpoint or SpacetimeDB subscription it uses, and whether CLI/MCP can access the same data.

tasks.name: Identify dashboard-only features
tasks.description: Find features visible in the dashboard that have no CLI/MCP equivalent. Examples might include: dependency graph visualization, architecture score ring, agent pulse animations, event stream filtering. Classify each as: needs CLI equivalent, needs MCP tool, or dashboard-only-by-design.

phases.name: Audit nexus REST endpoints
phases.description: Map all nexus REST endpoints to their consumers (CLI, MCP, dashboard, hooks).

tasks.name: Extract all REST routes from hex-nexus
tasks.description: Parse hex-nexus/src/routes/mod.rs build_router() function. Extract all .route() calls with method and path. Cross-reference against: CLI commands that call NexusClient, MCP tools that delegate to nexus, dashboard fetch/restClient calls, hook handlers that POST to nexus.

tasks.name: Identify orphaned and undocumented endpoints
tasks.description: Find REST endpoints with no known consumer (orphaned). Find endpoints not documented in OpenAPI spec (undocumented). Flag deprecated endpoints that are still active.

phases.name: Produce parity matrix and remediation plan
phases.description: Synthesize all audits into a single parity matrix and prioritized remediation workplan.

tasks.name: Create unified parity matrix
tasks.description: Build a single markdown table: rows = features, columns = CLI / MCP / Dashboard / REST. Mark each cell as: ✓ (present), ✗ (missing), ~ (partial). Sort by priority: features missing from 2+ surfaces first.

tasks.name: Create remediation workplan
tasks.description: For each gap in the parity matrix, create a task: add MCP tool, add CLI command, add dashboard pane, or document as intentionally-missing. Prioritize by user impact. Output as a new workplan JSON.

success_metrics: Complete parity matrix covering all CLI commands, MCP tools, and dashboard views
Every REST endpoint mapped to its consumers
Remediation workplan created with prioritized gaps
dependency_order: P1 + P2 + P3 (parallel, tier 0) → P4 (tier 1) → P5 (tier 2)
